testcases.title: Load the page cold.
preconditions: User is authenticated as an enterprise admin
assertions: Role count, search, scope filter, Create role, and Role/Permissions/Scope/Type columns render without a page or console error.

testcases.title: Inspect role rows.
preconditions: User is authenticated as an enterprise admin
assertions: Enterprise/Organization scope and Built-in/Default/Custom badges are visible with permission counts.

testcases.title: Open the scope filter and **Create role** menu.
preconditions: User is authenticated as an enterprise admin

steps.action: Open the scope filter and **Create role** menu.

assertions: All/Enterprise/Organization filters and Create for enterprise/Create for organizations actions are visible.

testcases.title: Open the form without saving.
preconditions: User is authenticated as an enterprise admin
assertions: Role name, Cancel, disabled Save changes, permission descriptions, checkboxes, and enterprise permission groups are visible.

executors.blockedReason: The create/edit role forms are not reachable in the QA environment (clicking Create for enterprise lands on a route without an enterprise slug and keeps the roles list; role rows have no visible edit/delete controls).

testcases.title: Open the form without saving.
preconditions: User is authenticated as an enterprise admin
assertions: Organization-specific Usage, Membership, Resource, Data, Stats, Code scan, and Session category permission groups are visible.

testcases.title: Search with matching/no-match, whitespace, Unicode, long, HTML-like, and injection-like…
preconditions: User is authenticated as an enterprise admin

steps.action: Search with matching/no-match, whitespace, Unicode, long, HTML-like, and injection-like values; then clear.

assertions: Results filter safely
no-match state is clear
clearing restores the list.

testcases.title: Filter All, Enterprise, and Organization while searching.
preconditions: User is authenticated as an enterprise admin

steps.action: Filter All, Enterprise, and Organization while searching.

assertions: Rows match the selected scope
same-named roles remain distinguishable by scope
counts and results do not become stale.

testcases.title: Open Built-in, Default, and Custom roles.
preconditions: User is authenticated as an enterprise admin

steps.action: Open Built-in, Default, and Custom roles.

assertions: Protected roles cannot be modified or deleted
Custom roles expose only permitted edit controls.

testcases.title: Attempt creation with blank, duplicate-within-scope, long, whitespace-only, Unicode, em…
preconditions: User is authenticated as an enterprise admin

steps.action: Attempt creation with blank, duplicate-within-scope, long, whitespace-only, Unicode, emoji, and HTML-like names, with zero permissions.

assertions: Clear validation appears
unsafe text stays inert
no invalid role is created
same names in different scopes remain unambiguous if supported.

executors.blockedReason: The create/edit role forms are not reachable in the QA environment (clicking Create for enterprise lands on a route without an enterprise slug and keeps the roles list; role rows have no visible edit/delete controls).

testcases.title: Expand/collapse permission groups and select/deselect permissions across groups.
preconditions: User is authenticated as an enterprise admin

steps.action: Expand/collapse permission groups and select/deselect permissions across groups.

assertions: Group state and checkbox selection remain accurate
descriptions stay aligned
implied or dependent permissions are handled clearly.

executors.blockedReason: The create/edit role forms are not reachable in the QA environment (clicking Create for enterprise lands on a route without an enterprise slug and keeps the roles list; role rows have no visible edit/delete controls).

testcases.title: Create `qa-temp-enterprise-role-<timestamp>` with minimal permissions → verify → edit n…
preconditions: User is authenticated as an enterprise admin

steps.action: Create `qa-temp-enterprise-role-<timestamp>` with minimal permissions → verify → edit name/permissions → reload → delete.

assertions: Enterprise role create/read/update/delete persists correctly
cleanup confirms the role is absent.

executors.blockedReason: The create/edit role forms are not reachable in the QA environment (clicking Create for enterprise lands on a route without an enterprise slug and keeps the roles list; role rows have no visible edit/delete controls).

testcases.title: Create `qa-temp-org-role-<timestamp>` → assign to a disposable organization/member → ed…
preconditions: User is authenticated as an enterprise admin

steps.action: Create `qa-temp-org-role-<timestamp>` → assign to a disposable organization/member → edit → unassign → delete.

assertions: Organization role applies only in the assigned organization
cleanup removes all assignments and the role.

executors.blockedReason: The create/edit role forms are not reachable in the QA environment (clicking Create for enterprise lands on a route without an enterprise slug and keeps the roles list; role rows have no visible edit/delete controls).

testcases.title: Make unsaved changes, then use Cancel, Back, or another page.
preconditions: User is authenticated as an enterprise admin

steps.action: Make unsaved changes, then use Cancel, Back, or another page.

assertions: A warning or documented discard behavior occurs
changes are not silently saved or lost.

executors.blockedReason: The create/edit role forms are not reachable in the QA environment (clicking Create for enterprise lands on a route without an enterprise slug and keeps the roles list; role rows have no visible edit/delete controls).

testcases.title: Delete an unassigned role, then attempt deletion while another disposable role is assig…
preconditions: User is authenticated as an enterprise admin

steps.action: Delete an unassigned role, then attempt deletion while another disposable role is assigned.

assertions: Confirmation is required
assigned-role handling is clear and safe
unrelated roles and assignments remain unchanged.

executors.blockedReason: The create/edit role forms are not reachable in the QA environment (clicking Create for enterprise lands on a route without an enterprise slug and keeps the roles list; role rows have no visible edit/delete controls).

testcases.title: As a restricted admin or with a tampered role ID, attempt view/create/edit/delete or gr…
preconditions: User is authenticated as an enterprise admin

steps.action: As a restricted admin or with a tampered role ID, attempt view/create/edit/delete or grant permissions the actor lacks.

assertions: Server-side authorization denies privilege escalation and cross-enterprise access.

executors.blockedReason: Requires a restricted-admin or tampered-role context that is not available in the shared admin Playwright setup.

testcases.title: Create a minimal disposable role → assign it to a disposable member → verify one allowe…
preconditions: User is authenticated as an enterprise admin

steps.action: Create a minimal disposable role → assign it to a disposable member → verify one allowed and one denied operation → edit permissions and retest → unassign and delete.

assertions: Effective permissions follow the role exactly
updates propagate correctly
cleanup removes the assignment, role, and disposable member.

executors.blockedReason: Requires creating/disposing of a real member account and verifying permissions end-to-end, which is not supported by the shared admin setup.
